project: Landing page and html/css design and development assistant
review: Benjamin was amazing to work with. We worked on a couple of projects together and he's extremely knowledgeable on anything related to web development, html, javascript, css and server side.
Benjamin did excellent work again. Great experience!
Benjamin did an excellent job on some web design work for us. He is wonderful to work with and I look forward to working together again.

He finished my project 100% like I expected. I am really lucky to find a worker like Benjamin for my changes on the website. Very fast, very polite, great communication and absolutely perfect work. Every detail could be fixed by him in a few minutes. 100% happy with the work.

project: 4 web sites need to be refreshed and maintained
review: Ben and Bridget are hard working and they want to make sure you are happy with the product. Good experience and very easy to work with.

It was an absolute pleasure to work with Benjamin on a recent website project. He is talented, patient, professional and excellent with communication. He met all the deadlines and was willing to continue to work together for additional changes.
This was my second job and there will be more jobs in the future. Thank you Ben.
I contacted Benjamin to help fix my website. He went above and beyond. He is very patient to work with and very knowledgeable in his work.
I like working with Ben, he is full of suggestions and has a great work ethic.
After working for weeks with Ben on the development of my new website, I must say that I am extremely excited with the end result. Working with Ben was amazing.
Ben is an absolutely fantastic web developer. He understood what was required and went above and beyond. His communication skills were excellent and his work was exceptional.
Benjamin was great. He went above and beyond to meet our expectations for a custom WordPress design. He was quick to reply and great with communicating his progress.
Great people and finally someone can be trusted across the world.
Amazing. Working with Benjamin was great. Very professional and knows his stuff when it comes to web design.
Benjamin, in one word, phenomenal. He went above and beyond for my Squarespace website design.
Benjamin is a very talented web designer who did a fantastic job. He was very reliable, gave great suggestions and implemented feedback well.
Benjamin went above and beyond in helping me create my ideal brand website. He has vision, work ethic and excellent communication skills.

project: Looking for a long-term Full-Stack Developer
review: Great work!
Totally satisfied with how Benjamin worked with us. He adhered to tight delivery dates and cooperated with our various requests.
Benjamin was wonderful to work with. He delivered items quickly and went above and beyond when there were time sensitivities on the job.
Great to work with. Highly recommend.
Benjamin is a professional designer and developer and it has been a pleasure working with him.
Great addition to my team. Communicated every step of the way and had the job done sooner than expected.
Benjamin did great, will hire him again.
Great communicator, detail oriented and held firm on his commitments.
Knowledgeable, professional, responsive and highly capable.

project: Update our website design with Elementor
review: Benjamin got our Figma sketches and built us a great website in Elementor. He understood the task well and was very nice to work with.

project: E-commerce website for a non profit
review: He is very knowledgeable and flexible when it comes to making changes on the work.
Hired multiple times for different projects and fantastic to work with every time.

project: Website designer developer for ongoing partnership
review: Pleasure from start to finish. Great service and final design. Highly recommended.
Fantastic developer, great service and end product. Highly recommended.

project: Building website based on Elementor / WordPress
review: Very skilled WordPress Elementor developer with great eye for detail and strong communication.

project: Need to fix a WordPress error with Elementor
review: Thank you so much.
